site.name: Sawariya Solution
site.sub: I T   S O L U T I O N S
site.description: A Vadodara-based IT studio building web, software, mobile and cloud products for growing businesses across India.

contact.address: TF 39, Siddheshwar Hallmark, Ajwa Road, Vadodara, Gujarat 390019

services.title: Web Development & Design
services.short: Custom websites and web apps — responsive, fast, and built to convert.
services.full: Tailored web solutions: custom applications, responsive front-ends, e-commerce platforms, REST/API integrations, and ongoing maintenance for a seamless online experience.

services.title: Software Development
services.short: ERP, CRM and workflow systems that run the daily business.
services.full: Custom and enterprise software — ERP, CRM, and workflow automation, plus inventory, HR, and finance systems tailored to how your team actually works.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.short: Native and cross-platform apps for Android and iOS.
services.full: Design and development of Android and iOS applications — native, hybrid, and cross-platform — from first wireframe to store launch and beyond.

services.title: Cloud & Hosting Solutions
services.short: Reliable hosting, automated backups, and disaster recovery.
services.full: Reliable web hosting (shared, VPS, dedicated, cloud), domain registration, automated cloud backups, and disaster-recovery strategies that keep you online.

services.title: Digital Marketing & SEO
services.short: Data-driven SEO, social, and campaigns that bring real demand.
services.full: Unlock the full potential of digital marketing where creativity meets data — SEO, social media, and paid campaigns across every major platform.

services.title: IT Consulting & Support
services.short: Strategy, infrastructure, and 24/7 support you can lean on.
services.full: Expert guidance on IT infrastructure, digital transformation, and technology adoption — with 24/7 help-desk support, troubleshooting, and managed maintenance.

products.title: Sawariya CRM
products.short: Leads, clients, tasks, and tickets in one tidy workspace for your sales team.

products.title: Sawariya ERP
products.short: Run inventory, billing, purchase, and accounts from a single connected suite.

products.title: Hospital Management

products.title: Smart POS & Billing
products.short: GST billing, stock, and day-end reports for shops and restaurants.

products.title: Sawariya HRMS
products.short: Attendance, payroll, leave, and employee records without the spreadsheets.

products.title: School & Institute ERP
products.short: Admissions, fees, attendance, and parent communication in one portal.

values.title: Under one roof
values.body: Web, software, mobile, cloud, and marketing from a single team — no juggling vendors.

values.title: Built to last
values.body: We write maintainable code and document it, so your product keeps working after launch.

values.title: Plain answers
values.body: No jargon, no runaround. We explain what we're doing and why, in language you can use.

values.title: We pick up the phone
values.body: Local, responsive support. When something breaks, a real person responds the same day.

process.title: Discover
process.body: We learn your business, users, and goals before writing a line of code.

process.title: Design
process.body: Wireframes and visual design you approve before development begins.

process.title: Build
process.body: We develop in short cycles and show you working software, not status reports.

process.title: Launch & support
process.body: We ship, monitor, and stay on call — your launch is the start, not the end.
